paper_title: STARE: Surprisal-Guided Token-Level Advantage Reweighting for Policy Entropy Stability

research_directions.direction: Extend STARE to PPO/REINFORCE token-level analysis
research_directions.rationale: Theory only covers GRPO; PPO/REINFORCE may need different token credit assignment
Target entropy is currently a manual hyperparameter

research_directions.direction: Apply STARE to general NL tasks beyond math/code
research_directions.rationale: RLVR currently limited to verifiable reasoning tasks

research_directions.direction: Integrate STARE with Agent RL training (tool-use, multi-step)
research_directions.rationale: Agent training often uses per-step rewards; token-level credit assignment could help

research_directions.direction: Surprisal-based token selection for efficient RL memory
research_directions.rationale: Tokens with highest entropy impact could be prioritized in replay buffers
